description_long: This is a large, dark reddish-brown wooden desk with a raised hutch featuring open shelving on the left and a flat top surface. The desk is equipped with a computer setup, including a central widescreen monitor, a secondary monitor mounted on an adjustable arm, a full-size keyboard, a mouse, and a desktop computer tower positioned on the right side. A modern, articulated desk lamp is attached to the hutch, providing overhead lighting. The left side of the hutch contains a blue water bottle and a red book, while the right side is clear except for the computer equipment. Multiple cables are visible trailing from the monitors and computer, indicating active electronic use.
description: A large, dark reddish-brown wooden desk with a raised hutch, computer setup, and attached lamp. Features shelving, dual monitors, and a desktop tower.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full desk setup, including the keyboard, mouse, dual monitors, lamp, water bottle, and book on the hutch.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the computer tower beneath the desk, the secondary monitor's mounting arm, and visible cable management.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the monitors, the hutch structure, and trailing cables.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the shelving with a book and water bottle, as well as the main workspace surface.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the open front with the keyboard, monitors, and workspace, while the hutch and shelving are at the back and left side.
